mapper.select: SELECT id, `year_month`, supplier_name, category, total, grade, dimension_a, dimension_b, dimension_c, dimension_d, sub_a1, sub_a2, sub_a3, sub_a4, sub_b1, sub_b2, sub_b3, sub_b4, sub_b5, sub_c1, sub_c2, sub_c3, sub_d1a, sub_d1b, sub_d2a, sub_d2b, sub_d2c, sub_d2d, sub_d2e, conclusion, exception_quality, exception_cost, exception_delivery, exception_service_product, exception_service_package, exception_other, status, file_name, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, `year_month`, supplier_name, category, total, grade, dimension_a, dimension_b, dimension_c, dimension_d, sub_a1, sub_a2, sub_a3, sub_a4, sub_b1, sub_b2, sub_b3, sub_b4, sub_b5, sub_c1, sub_c2, sub_c3, sub_d1a, sub_d1b, sub_d2a, sub_d2b, sub_d2c, sub_d2d, sub_d2e, conclusion, exception_quality, exception_cost, exception_delivery, exception_service_product, exception_service_package, exception_other, status, file_name, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND supplier_name = #{supplierName} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_monthly_assessment (id, `year_month`, supplier_name, category, total, grade, dimension_a, dimension_b, dimension_c, dimension_d, sub_a1, sub_a2, sub_a3, sub_a4, sub_b1, sub_b2, sub_b3, sub_b4, sub_b5, sub_c1, sub_c2, sub_c3, sub_d1a, sub_d1b, sub_d2a, sub_d2b, sub_d2c, sub_d2d, sub_d2e, conclusion, exception_quality, exception_cost, exception_delivery, exception_service_product, exception_service_package, exception_other, status, file_name, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{yearMonth}, #{supplierName}, #{category}, #{total}, #{grade}, #{dimensionA}, #{dimensionB}, #{dimensionC}, #{dimensionD}, #{subA1}, #{subA2}, #{subA3}, #{subA4}, #{subB1}, #{subB2}, #{subB3}, #{subB4}, #{subB5}, #{subC1}, #{subC2}, #{subC3}, #{subD1a}, #{subD1b}, #{subD2a}, #{subD2b}, #{subD2c}, #{subD2d}, #{subD2e}, #{conclusion}, #{exceptionQuality}, #{exceptionCost}, #{exceptionDelivery}, #{exceptionServiceProduct}, #{exceptionServicePackage}, #{exceptionOther}, #{status}, #{fileName}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_monthly_assessment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sp_monthly_assessment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth} AND supplier_name = #{supplierName} AND is_deleted = 0
